---
title: "Tables + models"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
    self-contained: true
---

```{r setup}

#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = T, warning = F, message = F, echo = T, fig.dim = c(12,6), fig.width = 25, fig.height = 10, dpi = 300, fig.pos = "!h"
)

packages = c("tidyverse","Hmisc","arsenal","kableExtra")



suppressWarnings(
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(invisible(lapply(packages, require, character.only = T))))


theme_set(theme_minimal()+
            theme(legend.position = "bottom")+
            theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
                  plot.subtitle= element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 8)))

custom_cat_test <- function(currcol, bycol, 
                            chisq.correct = FALSE, 
                            simulate.p.value = FALSE, 
                            B = 2000, 
                            wilcox.correct, 
                            wilcox.exact, 
                            test.always, 
                            ...) {
  # Create the contingency table
  tab <- table(currcol, bycol)
  
  # Attempt chi-square test without continuity correction (as specified)
  chisq_result <- try(chisq.test(tab, 
                                 correct = chisq.correct, 
                                 simulate.p.value = simulate.p.value, 
                                 B = B),
                      silent = TRUE)
  
  # If the test fails or expected counts are below 5, use Fisher's exact test
  if (inherits(chisq_result, "try-error") || any(chisq_result$expected < 5)) {
    fisher_result <- fisher.test(tab, ...)
    p_val <- fisher_result$p.value
    method_used <- "Fisher's Exact Test"
  } else {
    p_val <- chisq_result$p.value
    method_used <- "Chi-Squared Test"
  }
  
  # Return a list with at least the p-value
  return(list(p.value = p_val, method = method_used))
}


my_controls <- arsenal::tableby.control(
  test = T,
  total = T,
  numeric.test = "kwt", cat.test = "custom_cat_test",
  numeric.stats = c("N", "meansd", "medianq1q3", "range", "Nmiss2"),
  cat.stats = c("countpct", "Nmiss2"),
  stats.labels = list(
    meansd = "Mean (SD)",
    medianq1q3 = "median (Q1, Q3)",
    range = "Min - Max",
    Nmiss2 = "Missing"
  )
)

#quarto::quarto_render("First Pass.qmd")

```


## Data management 

Filtered only to rater 4's responses. 

```{r}


data_3 = read_csv("../data/final_data.csv") %>% 
  mutate(clinic_id = row_number()) %>% 
   janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  select(clinic_id,contains("location"), 
          contains("clinic"), everything(),-clinic_name) %>% 
 
  # concatenating state variables
  mutate(
         state = case_when( 
    location_ny == 1 & !location_nj == 1 & !location_ct == 1 ~"Single State",
    !location_ny == 1 & location_nj == 1 & !location_ct == 1 ~"Single State",
    !location_ny == 1 & !location_nj == 1 & location_ct == 1 ~"Single State",
    TRUE ~ "combination"
  ),
  state = forcats::fct_relevel(state, "Single State","combination")
  
  ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(location_ny:depressive_disorders),as.character) 

```


## Table 1

```{r, results='asis'}

arsenal::tableby( ~ state+visits_virtual+degree+depression+anxiety+ptsd+ocd+other_pain_head+bipolar_disorder+sud+other_suicide+other_mh+form_oral+promotional+risk+citations, 
                 data = data_3
   , 
  control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary()


```


## Lasso Selected model

```{r}

library(glmnet)
library(pROC)

# Building design matrix and outcome
all_vars <- c(
  "state",
  "degree",
  "depressive_disorders","anxiety", "ptsd", "ocd", "other_pain_head", "bipolar_disorder", "sud", "other_suicide",
  "other_mh","form_oral","promotional", "risk", "citations"
  
)

acronyms <- c("NY","NJ","CT", "OCD","PTSD", "SUD", "PPD", "MH")

tablabels <- setNames(
  sapply(all_vars, function(var) {
    parts <- str_split(var, "_")[[1]]
    parts <- sapply(parts, function(w) {
      if (toupper(w) %in% acronyms) toupper(w)
      else str_to_title(w)
    }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
    paste(parts, collapse = " ")
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE),
  all_vars
)
X <- model.matrix(reformulate(all_vars), data = data_3)[, -1]
y <- data_3 %>% mutate(clinic_telehealth = recode(clinic_telehealth,"Telehealth No" = 0, "Telehealth Yes" = 1)) %>% pull(clinic_telehealth)

# Generating a fixed 10-fold split
set.seed(123)
n <- nrow(data_3)
foldid <- sample(rep(1:10, length.out = n))

# cross-validated LASSO optimizing AUC
cv_lasso_auc <- cv.glmnet(
  x             = X,
  y             = y,
  family        = "binomial",
  alpha         = 1,            # LASSO
  foldid        = foldid,
  type.measure  = "auc",        # maximize AUC
  nfolds        = 10
)

#  Inspecting the best lambda
lambda_best <- cv_lasso_auc$lambda.1se
#cat("Best λ (1-SE rule):", lambda_best, "\n")
#cat("CV-AUC at λ1se:", max(cv_lasso_auc$cvm), "\n")

# Final variables
final_coefs <- coef(cv_lasso_auc, s = lambda_best)
selected_vars <- rownames(final_coefs)[which(final_coefs != 0)][-1]
#cat("Selected predictors:\n")
#print(selected_vars)

  

final_mod  <- (robustbase::glmrob(clinic_telehealth ~ form_oral + degree, data = data_3 %>% mutate(clinic_telehealth =recode(clinic_telehealth,"Telehealth No" = 0, "Telehealth Yes" = 1)), 
                 family = poisson(link = "log"),
                 na.action = na.omit) %>% summary())$coefficients %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  transmute(
    term,
    est       = exp(estimate),
    conf_low  = exp(estimate - 1.96 * `std_error`),
    conf_high  = exp(estimate + 1.96 * `std_error`),
    pval = pr_z
  ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(est, conf_low, conf_high), ~signif(.,2)) %>% 
    mutate(conf_high = ifelse(conf_high > 1e6, Inf, conf_high),
           term =c("Form Oral", "Degree")) 

crude_tbl <- map_dfr(all_vars, function(var) {
 
  #creating formula for crude models
  fmla <- as.formula(paste0("clinic_telehealth ~ ", var))
  
  
  # crude models and joining to others
  (robustbase::glmrob(fmla, data = data_3 %>% mutate(clinic_telehealth =recode(clinic_telehealth,"Telehealth No" = 0, "Telehealth Yes" = 1)), 
                 family = poisson(link = "log")) %>% summary())$coefficients %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  transmute(
    term,
    est      = exp(estimate),
    conf_low  = exp(estimate - 1.96 * `std_error`),
    conf_high  = exp(estimate + 1.96 * `std_error`),
    pval = pr_z
  ) %>%
    mutate_at(vars(est, conf_low, conf_high), ~signif(.,2)) %>% 
    mutate(conf_high = ifelse(conf_high > 1e6, Inf, conf_high),
           term = tibble(tablabels, all_vars) %>% filter(all_vars == var) %>% 
             pull(tablabels))
})

#fully adjusted formula
  full_fmla <- as.formula(paste("clinic_telehealth ~", paste(all_vars, collapse = " + ")))
  
  
  #fully adjusted model
full_mod  <- (robustbase::glmrob(full_fmla, data = data_3 %>% mutate(clinic_telehealth =recode(clinic_telehealth,"Telehealth No" = 0, "Telehealth Yes" = 1)), 
                 family = poisson(link = "log"),
                 na.action = na.omit) %>% summary())$coefficients %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  transmute(
    term,
    est       = exp(estimate),
    conf_low  = exp(estimate - 1.96 * `std_error`),
    conf_high  = exp(estimate + 1.96 * `std_error`),
    pval = pr_z
  ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(est, conf_low, conf_high), ~signif(.,2)) %>% 
    mutate(conf_high = ifelse(conf_high > 1e6, Inf, conf_high),
           term = tablabels,
           labels =all_vars) 




crude_tbl %>%
    transmute(
      term,
      Crude = sprintf("%0.2f (%0.2f–%0.2f)", est, conf_low, conf_high),
      `Crude p value` = pval %>% round(.,4)
    ) %>% 
  left_join(full_mod %>% 
  transmute(
    term,
    `Fully Adjusted` = sprintf("%0.2f (%0.2f–%0.2f)", est, conf_low, conf_high),
    `.p value` = pval %>% round(.,4)
  ),by="term" ) %>% 
  left_join(final_mod %>% 
  transmute(
    term,
    `Final` = sprintf("%0.2f (%0.2f–%0.2f)", est, conf_low, conf_high),
    `Final p value` = pval %>% round(.,4)
  ),by="term" ) %>% 
  kable("html", align = c("l","c","c","c"),
        caption = "Adjusted and Crude PRs with CIs") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE) 
```
